text: Aaj Boss ne puri team ke samne mujhe bahut ganda sunaya aur kaha ki mujh jaise JEE dropout ki yahi auqat hai, par main chupchap sunta raha. Gaon mein baarish se sari fasal barbaad ho gayi hai aur Papa loan ki kist nahi bhar paye, isliye mujhe ye naukri har haal mein bachauni hai. Agar main palat kar jawab deta toh meri badtameezi ki wajah se Papa ki 'izzat' mitti mein mil jati aur ghar ka sahara chala jata.

Boss roz unpaid overtime karwate hain aur mana karne par gaali-galoch karte hain, par main unke pair pakadne ko bhi taiyar hoon kyunki mere paas koi exit option nahi hai. Khet mein nuksan hone ki wajah se bank ki EMI bounce ho gayi hai aur ab main unhe naraz karke apne parivaar ka nuksan nahi kar sakta. Unki har kadwi baat main isliye nigal leta hoon taaki ghar ki maryada aur unka samman bana rahe.

MNC ki internship mein Boss mujh par chillate hain par main hamesha sir jhuka kar 'ji sir' kehta hoon kyunki unka ashirwad hi meri placement dilwayega. Ghar se khabar aayi hai ki crop destroy hone ki wajah se sahukar ka karz badh gaya hai, isliye main unse bahas karke apni image kharab nahi kar sakta. Main nahi chahta ki meri wajah se Papa ko gaon mein kisi ke samne nichi aankhein karni padein.

Humare startup ka Boss sabke samne meri degree ka mazaak udata hai, par main usey guruji ki tarah samman deta hoon taaki wo mujhe nikal na de. Udhar gaon mein kisan baap ki fasal ujadh gayi hai aur EMI bharne ke paise nahi hain, isliye mere upar bohot bada remittance burden hai. Main unki har zillat sehta hoon kyunki ek adarsh beta apne bade-buzurgo aur malik ke khilaaf nahi bolta.

Boss ne aaj meeting mein mujhe itna zaleel kiya ki main hostel ja kar ro diya, par office mein unke aage zubaan nahi kholi. Papa ne bade arman se loan lekar mujhe shehar bheja tha aur ab fasal barbaad hone par unki sari umeed mujh par hai, isliye main kalesh karke unki tension nahi badha sakta. Main bas chupchap unki gulamiyat kar raha hoon taaki ghar ki shanti aur parivaar ki 'naak' bachi rahe.
